mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SITE_IDX, SITE_NAME, SITE_DESC, LINK_TARGET, PRINT_SEQ, ADD_DATE FROM CMS_SITE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SITE_IDX = #{site_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_SITE SET SITE_NAME = #{site_name}, SITE_DESC = #{site_desc}, LINK_TARGET = #{link_target}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SITE_IDX = #{site_idx}
